message:
feat(beads): Create comprehensive improvement roadmap with 10 epics and 78 subtasks

Add detailed beads structure for charmed_rust improvement initiatives:

Epics (P1 - High Priority):
- charmed_rust-l7j: Port Go Examples to Rust (7 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-idi: Add Syntax Highlighting to Glamour (8 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-0p1: Add Comprehensive Benchmark Suite (8 subtasks)

Epics (P2 - Medium Priority):
- charmed_rust-ghn: Replace Thread Spawning with Async (8 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-jpq: Add Derive Macro for Model Trait (8 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-mfc: Implement Glamour Table Rendering (8 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-wsu: Standardize Error Handling with thiserror (8 subtasks)

Epics (P3 - Future):
- charmed_rust-dnt: Add Property-Based Testing with proptest (8 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-64r: Add WASM Support for lipgloss/glamour (8 subtasks)
- charmed_rust-eli: Add Theme System with Switchable Presets (8 subtasks)

Epic-level dependencies:
- Async (ghn) blocked by Benchmarks (0p1)
- Derive Macro (jpq) blocked by Examples (l7j)
- WASM (64r) blocked by Syntax Highlighting (idi) AND Tables (mfc)

Each subtask includes detailed descriptions with:
- Code examples and implementation notes
- Acceptance criteria
- Business justification and context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
